reviews.review_title: THIS GAME IS ABSOLUTELY THE BEST
reviews.review_description: Look I have been playing this game for about a week, and It updates often, gives you long arms, infinite shiny rox AND A VERY ACTIVE COMMUNITY!! Im recommending this game! Thanks!

I get banned for saying the hard r EVEN THOUGH I DIDN'T. I guess moderators whenever they report someone it doesn't get checked, no proof, and it does it no matter what. Moderator you guys have TOO much power🫩🫩🫩

developer_response.body: That is not an issue with the game, rather moderation. You are able to make a ban appeal in the discord.

reviews.review_description: Bro this game is a w since memory tag is shutten down this game is recent update alot of shiny rocks and everything also long arms

This game is so fun has a great and funny community but I do wanna tell you there's a guy that's some how able to kick people he doesn't have the stick we checked his cosmetics but I dont want him to get banned he seems to be a good person he kicks bad people that say slurs which people rarely do but he doesn't abuse it idk how he does it tho but they seem to making people have a good time he or she assuming he is the only reason I gave the game 5 stars please dont ban him have a good day. 



Btw he's dark blue with a 4 letter name if he abuses tell someone in the dc server.

reviews.review_title: Why you Sould get visual tag
reviews.review_description:
number 1: has lots of players

Number 2: working lobby’s 

3: nice people

4: lots of staff

5: had a nice discord and you get long arms

6 you can get 5 free cosmetics if you rate the game 5 stars
BEST GAME BECAUSE ITS ACTIVE ALL THE TIME. IF U FEELIN DOWN THIS IS THE GAME TO PLAY BROOOO SOO YEEAHHH THE THE OWNER AND THE MODERATORS ARE COOL SO PLAY THE GAME🔥🔥🔥🔥

BEST GAME EVER first it gives you free long arms and it’s in the newest update in real gorilla tag and the owners are great and the community is nice and somethimes bad but still the game is really good and you should download it :)
can you please give me mode people are making fun of me for not knowing any zooks

In this game there is a good community and there are good moderators and other staff the players are friendly and nice also you get long arms and infinite shiny rocks I highly recommend this game it's my favorite game that I've ever played

This is the best gorilla tag fan game i have ever played in my entire life ￼and my friends agree with it me to!


But tbh add more speed boost please 🙏 ￼
